review.rationale: 与 jwt-none-alg 重复，不再保留第二张同名 Payload；全部本地工作流按 command index 迁入工具。
与 jwt-key-confusion 重复，key fixture、算法混淆和格式检查迁入工具，不创建重复 Payload。
算法识别、三候选字典核验、hashcat/jwt_tool 和本地签名验证均为工具工作流。

description.zh: 分别验证 issuer、audience、expiration 与显式 token type，只有完全匹配的短期测试 token 可以访问只读标记。
description.en: Validates issuer, audience, expiration, and explicit token type independently so only a fully matching short-lived test token reaches the read-only marker.

title.zh: JWT Claim Profile 验证对照 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
now = int(time.time())
cases = {
    "valid": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "wrong-issuer": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-other","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "wrong-audience": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-other","iat":now,"exp":now+60},
    "expired": {"sub":"payloader-user","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":now-120,"exp":now-60},
}
for name, claims in cases.items():
    header = encode({"alg":"HS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","kid":"PAYLOADER_TEST_KEY"})
    payload = encode(claims)
    signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(secret, (header+"."+payload).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+header+"."+payload+"."+signature})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(name, status)
PY
# Only the valid profile reaches the read-only marker; issuer, audience, and expiration failures are independent.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT Claim Profile 验证对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。
description.en: Run this JWT Claim Profile Validation control in isolation, access only the localhost read-only marker, and record server-side algorithm, key, and claim decisions.

title.zh: 建立JWT Claim Profile 验证基线

description.zh: 用测试 issuer 签发短期有效 token，记录算法、key ID、issuer、audience、type、主体和标记访问。
description.en: Issue a short-lived valid token from the test issuer and record algorithm, key ID, issuer, audience, type, principal, and marker access.

title.zh: 提交JWT Claim Profile 验证阴性对照
title.en: Submit the JWT Claim Profile Validation Negative Control

description.zh: 只提交当前验证卡的第一条对照，并保持 issuer、主体和只读目标不变。
description.en: Submit only the first control in this validation card while keeping issuer, principal, and read-only target unchanged.

title.zh: 确认验证器拒绝分支

description.zh: 关联算法选择、key resolver、claim 校验、HTTP 状态和最终主体，排除仅能生成或解码 token 的假阳性。
description.en: Correlate algorithm selection, key resolver, claim validation, HTTP status, and final principal, excluding token generation or decoding as false positives.

title.zh: 撤销 fixture 并回归

description.zh: 删除本地 token、key、证书和缓存，重放有效基线与全部固定阴性对照。
description.en: Delete local tokens, keys, certificates, and caches, then replay the valid baseline and every fixed negative control.

name.zh: JWT 内嵌 JWK 信任验证

description.zh: 验证服务端不会直接信任 token 自带的 jwk，而只使用 issuer 配置中固定的 key 来源。
description.en: Verifies that the server does not trust a token-supplied jwk and uses only key sources pinned in issuer configuration.

subCategory.zh: JWT 内嵌 JWK 信任验证

title.zh: JWT 内嵌 JWK 信任验证对照 1
title.en: JWT Embedded JWK Trust Validation Control 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
header = encode({"alg":"HS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","jwk":{"kty":"oct","kid":"PAYLOADER_UNTRUSTED","k":"UEFZTE9BREVSX1VOVFJVU1RFRA"}})
payload = encode({"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(b"PAYLOADER_UNTRUSTED", (header+"."+payload).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+header+"."+payload+"."+signature})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: the token-supplied JWK is ignored and the token is rejected because no configured key matches.

name.zh: JWT X5C 证书链信任验证
name.en: JWT X5C Certificate Chain Trust Validation

description.zh: 使用本地自签测试证书构造签名正确的阴性 token，确认验证器仍执行完整证书链和 issuer 信任校验。
description.en: Uses a locally self-signed test certificate to create a correctly signed negative token and confirms that the verifier still validates the certificate chain and issuer trust.

subCategory.zh: JWT X5C 证书链信任验证
subCategory.en: JWT X5C Certificate Chain Trust Validation

title.zh: JWT X5C 证书链信任验证对照 1
title.en: JWT X5C Certificate Chain Trust Validation Control 1

execution.command:
work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl req -x509 -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout "$work_dir/key.pem" -out "$work_dir/cert.pem" -days 1 -subj "/CN=payloader-untrusted"
python3 - "$work_dir/key.pem" "$work_dir/cert.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, json, subprocess, sys, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda raw: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw).rstrip(b"=").decode()
certificate = subprocess.check_output(["openssl","x509","-in",sys.argv[2],"-outform","DER"])
header = encode(json.dumps({"alg":"RS256","typ":"payloader+jwt","x5c":[base64.b64encode(certificate).decode()]}, separators=(",",":")).encode())
payload = encode(json.dumps({"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60}, separators=(",",":")).encode())
signing_input = (header+"."+payload).encode()
signature = subprocess.check_output(["openssl","dgst","-sha256","-sign",sys.argv[1]], input=signing_input)
token = header+"."+payload+"."+encode(signature)
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: a correctly signed token with an untrusted self-signed x5c chain is rejected.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 1

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBheWxvYWRlcitqd3QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJwYXlsb2FkZXItdXNlciIsImlzcyI6InBheWxvYWRlci10ZXN0IiwiYXVkIjoicGF5bG9hZGVyLWFwaSJ9.PAYLOADER_TEST_SIGNATURE"
for label, segment in zip(("header", "payload"), token.split(".")[:2]):
    decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(segment + "=" * (-len(segment) % 4))
    print(label, json.loads(decoded))
PY
# Structure inspection does not verify the signature, issuer, audience, time, or token type.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 1

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
header = {"alg": "none", "typ": "payloader+jwt"}
claims = {"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60}
print(encode(header) + "." + encode(claims) + ".")
PY
# Expected: generation succeeds locally; every configured verifier rejects the unsigned token.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 2

commands.command:
work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$work_dir/test-private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$work_dir/test-private.pem" -pubout -out "$work_dir/test-public.pem"
python3 - "$work_dir/test-public.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, sys, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
public_key = open(sys.argv[1], "rb").read()
header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": "PAYLOADER_RSA_TEST_KEY"})
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(public_key, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
print(header + "." + claims + "." + signature)
PY
# This historical confusion token is generated only from a temporary local public key; a modern verifier rejects it.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 1

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac
message = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HEADER.PAYLOADER_TEST_PAYLOAD"
approved_secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
signature = hmac.new(approved_secret, message, hashlib.sha256).digest()
candidates = [b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_A", b"PAYLOADER_WRONG_B", approved_secret]
matches = [candidate.decode() for candidate in candidates if hmac.compare_digest(hmac.new(candidate, message, hashlib.sha256).digest(), signature)]
print({"candidate_count": len(candidates), "matches": matches})
PY
# Fixed three-candidate owned-token audit; no masks, general wordlists, or production material.

name.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝
name.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection

description.zh: 用固定数量的 none 大小写、缺失算法以及空、任意或缺失签名对照，确认验证器在使用 claim 前拒绝未签名 JWS。
description.en: Uses a fixed set of none case variants, missing algorithms, and empty, arbitrary, or missing signatures to confirm rejection before claims are used.

subCategory.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝
subCategory.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection

title.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照 1
title.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection Control 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
header = {"alg": "none", "typ": "payloader+jwt"}
claims = {"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60}
print(encode(header) + "." + encode(claims) + ".")
PY
# Expected: generation succeeds locally; every configured verifier rejects the unsigned token.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。
description.en: Run this JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection control in isolation, access only the localhost read-only marker, and record server-side algorithm, key, and claim decisions.

title.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照 2
title.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection Control 2

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
for subject in ("payloader-user", "payloader-negative"):
    claims = {"sub":subject,"iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60}
    print(encode({"alg":"none","typ":"payloader+jwt"})+"."+encode(claims)+".")
PY
# Claim changes do not matter because every unsigned token is rejected before authorization.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。

title.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照 3
title.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection Control 3

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
token = encode({"alg": "none", "typ": "payloader+jwt"}) + "." + encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60}) + "."
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: 401 or 403 and no authenticated principal.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。
description.en: Run this JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection control in isolation, access only the localhost read-only marker, and record server-side algorithm, key, and claim decisions.

title.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照 4
title.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection Control 4

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
for algorithm in ("none", "None", "NONE", ""):
    token = encode({"alg": algorithm, "typ": "payloader+jwt"}) + "." + claims + "."
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(repr(algorithm), status)
PY
# Fixed four-case budget; every unsigned or unapproved algorithm is rejected.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。

title.zh: JWT None 与未签名令牌拒绝对照 5
title.en: JWT None and Unsigned Token Rejection Control 5

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.error, urllib.request
tokens = (
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD.",
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD.PAYLOADER_ARBITRARY",
    "PAYLOADER_HEADER.PAYLOADER_PAYLOAD",
)
for token in tokens:
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(status)
PY
# Empty, arbitrary, and missing signature segments are all rejected before claim use.

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBheWxvYWRlcitqd3QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJwYXlsb2FkZXItdXNlciIsImlzcyI6InBheWxvYWRlci10ZXN0IiwiYXVkIjoicGF5bG9hZGVyLWFwaSJ9.PAYLOADER_TEST_SIGNATURE"
for label, segment in zip(("header", "payload"), token.split(".")[:2]):
    decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(segment + "=" * (-len(segment) % 4))
    print(label, json.loads(decoded))
PY
# Structure inspection does not verify the signature, issuer, audience, time, or token type.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.

name.zh: JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定

description.zh: 使用临时本地 RSA public key 构造历史 RS256 到 HS256 混淆对照，确认验证器固定算法且不把 public key 当 HMAC secret。
description.en: Builds a historical RS256-to-HS256 confusion control from a temporary local RSA public key and confirms that the verifier pins algorithms and never treats the public key as an HMAC secret.

subCategory.zh: JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定

title.zh: JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定对照 1
title.en: JWT Algorithm and Key-Type Binding Control 1

execution.command:
work_dir="$(mktemp -d)"
trap 'rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$work_dir/test-private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$work_dir/test-private.pem" -pubout -out "$work_dir/test-public.pem"
python3 - "$work_dir/test-public.pem" <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, sys, time
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
public_key = open(sys.argv[1], "rb").read()
header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": "PAYLOADER_RSA_TEST_KEY"})
claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-negative", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(public_key, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
print(header + "." + claims + "." + signature)
PY
# This historical confusion token is generated only from a temporary local public key; a modern verifier rejects it.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。
description.en: Run this JWT Algorithm and Key-Type Binding control in isolation, access only the localhost read-only marker, and record server-side algorithm, key, and claim decisions.

title.zh: JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定对照 2
title.en: JWT Algorithm and Key-Type Binding Control 2

execution.command:
curl -sS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer PAYLOADER_ALG_CONFUSION_TEST_TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker
# Expected: 401 or 403 because the verifier pins RS256 and refuses an RSA public key as an HMAC secret.

description.zh: 在隔离环境执行该JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定对照，只访问 localhost 只读标记，并记录服务端算法、key 与 claim 决策。

description.zh: 用测试 issuer 签发短期有效 token，记录算法、key ID、issuer、audience、type、主体和标记访问。
description.en: Issue a short-lived valid token from the test issuer and record algorithm, key ID, issuer, audience, type, principal, and marker access.

title.zh: 提交JWT 算法与 Key 类型绑定阴性对照
title.en: Submit the JWT Algorithm and Key-Type Binding Negative Control

description.zh: 只提交当前验证卡的第一条对照，并保持 issuer、主体和只读目标不变。
description.en: Submit only the first control in this validation card while keeping issuer, principal, and read-only target unchanged.

title.zh: 确认验证器拒绝分支

description.zh: 关联算法选择、key resolver、claim 校验、HTTP 状态和最终主体，排除仅能生成或解码 token 的假阳性。
description.en: Correlate algorithm selection, key resolver, claim validation, HTTP status, and final principal, excluding token generation or decoding as false positives.

title.zh: 撤销 fixture 并回归

description.zh: 删除本地 token、key、证书和缓存，重放有效基线与全部固定阴性对照。
description.en: Delete local tokens, keys, certificates, and caches, then replay the valid baseline and every fixed negative control.

name.zh: JWT KID 允许列表与查找边界
name.en: JWT KID Allowlist and Lookup Boundary

description.zh: 用已知、未知、禁用和超长的合成 kid 检查 key resolver，仅允许配置中的不透明标识进入签名验证。
description.en: Checks the key resolver with known, unknown, disabled, and overlong synthetic kid values so only configured opaque identifiers reach signature verification.

subCategory.zh: JWT KID 允许列表与查找边界
subCategory.en: JWT KID Allowlist and Lookup Boundary

title.zh: JWT KID 允许列表与查找边界对照 1
title.en: JWT KID Allowlist and Lookup Boundary Control 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, hashlib, hmac, json, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(json.dumps(value, separators=(",", ":")).encode()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
secret = b"PAYLOADER_TEST_HS256_SECRET_32_BYTES"
kids = ("PAYLOADER_TEST_KEY", "PAYLOADER_UNKNOWN_KEY", "PAYLOADER_DISABLED_KEY", "PAYLOADER_KEY_" + "X" * 80)
for kid in kids:
    header = encode({"alg": "HS256", "typ": "payloader+jwt", "kid": kid})
    claims = encode({"sub": "payloader-user", "iss": "payloader-test", "aud": "payloader-api", "iat": int(time.time()), "exp": int(time.time()) + 60})
    signature = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hmac.new(secret, (header + "." + claims).encode(), hashlib.sha256).digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode()
    request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + header + "." + claims + "." + signature})
    try:
        status = urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
        status = error.code
    print(kid[:32], status)
PY
# Only the configured opaque key ID may reach signature verification; unknown, disabled, and overlong identifiers are rejected.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 1

commands.command:
fixture_dir=".payloader-jwt-fixture"
mkdir -p "$fixture_dir"
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$fixture_dir/private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$fixture_dir/private.pem" -pubout -out "$fixture_dir/public.pem"
openssl pkey -pubin -in "$fixture_dir/public.pem" -outform DER | openssl dgst -sha256
# Disposable local fixture only; remove the directory after the batch.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。

name.zh: JWT JKU Key 来源允许列表

description.zh: 使用仅监听 localhost 的 JWK Set fixture，确认 token 自带 jku 只有在与测试 issuer 的预配置 URL 完全匹配时才可能被解析。
description.en: Uses a localhost-only JWK Set fixture to confirm that token-supplied jku is considered only when it exactly matches the URL preconfigured for the test issuer.

subCategory.zh: JWT JKU Key 来源允许列表

title.zh: JWT JKU Key 来源允许列表对照 1
title.en: JWT JKU Key Source Allowlisting Control 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import jwt, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
private_key = open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/private.pem", "rb").read()
token = jwt.encode(
    {"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60},
    private_key,
    algorithm="RS256",
    headers={"typ":"payloader+jwt","kid":"PAYLOADER_LOCAL_KEY","jku":"http://127.0.0.1:18080/jwks.json"},
)
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: reject unless the exact localhost JKU is preconfigured for the test issuer; arbitrary token-supplied URLs are never followed.

name.zh: JWT X5U 证书来源允许列表

description.zh: 使用 localhost 证书 fixture 检查 x5u URL 和证书链信任，验证器不得跟随任意 token 提供的证书位置。
description.en: Uses a localhost certificate fixture to check x5u URL and certificate-chain trust so the verifier never follows arbitrary token-provided certificate locations.

subCategory.zh: JWT X5U 证书来源允许列表

title.zh: JWT X5U 证书来源允许列表对照 1
title.en: JWT X5U Certificate Source Allowlisting Control 1

execution.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, subprocess, time, urllib.error, urllib.request
import jwt
subprocess.run(["openssl","req","-x509","-new","-key",".payloader-jwt-fixture/private.pem","-out",".payloader-jwt-fixture/test-cert.pem","-days","1","-subj","/CN=payloader-local"], check=True)
private_key = open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/private.pem", "rb").read()
token = jwt.encode(
    {"sub":"payloader-negative","iss":"payloader-test","aud":"payloader-api","iat":int(time.time()),"exp":int(time.time())+60},
    private_key,
    algorithm="RS256",
    headers={"typ":"payloader+jwt","kid":"PAYLOADER_LOCAL_KEY","x5u":"http://127.0.0.1:18080/test-cert.pem"},
)
request = urllib.request.Request("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/marker", headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+token})
try:
    print(urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5).status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:
    print(error.code)
PY
# Expected: reject unless the exact local X5U and certificate chain are preconfigured and trusted for the issuer.

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6InBheWxvYWRlcitqd3QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiJwYXlsb2FkZXItdXNlciIsImlzcyI6InBheWxvYWRlci10ZXN0IiwiYXVkIjoicGF5bG9hZGVyLWFwaSJ9.PAYLOADER_TEST_SIGNATURE"
for label, segment in zip(("header", "payload"), token.split(".")[:2]):
    decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(segment + "=" * (-len(segment) % 4))

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 1

commands.command:
fixture_dir=".payloader-jwt-fixture"
mkdir -p "$fixture_dir"
openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048 -out "$fixture_dir/private.pem"
openssl pkey -in "$fixture_dir/private.pem" -pubout -out "$fixture_dir/public.pem"
openssl pkey -pubin -in "$fixture_dir/public.pem" -outform DER | openssl dgst -sha256
# Disposable local fixture only; remove the directory after the batch.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.

title.zh: 本地 JWT 工具工作流 2

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
key = serialization.load_pem_public_key(open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/public.pem", "rb").read())
numbers = key.public_numbers()
encode = lambda value: base64.urlsafe_b64encode(value).rstrip(b"=").decode()
size = (numbers.n.bit_length() + 7) // 8
jwk = {"kty":"RSA","use":"sig","alg":"RS256","kid":"PAYLOADER_LOCAL_KEY","n":encode(numbers.n.to_bytes(size,"big")),"e":encode(numbers.e.to_bytes((numbers.e.bit_length()+7)//8,"big"))}
open(".payloader-jwt-fixture/jwks.json","w",encoding="utf-8").write(json.dumps({"keys":[jwk]}))
print(jwk["kid"])
PY
# Builds a localhost-only JWK Set from the disposable public key.
python3 -m http.server 18080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory .payloader-jwt-fixture > .payloader-jwt-fixture/server.log 2>&1 &
server_pid=$!
trap 'kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null' EXIT
curl -sS --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:18080/jwks.json
kill "$server_pid"
wait "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
trap - EXIT
# One bounded localhost fetch proves the fixture; no remote key URL is contacted.

description.zh: 仅在本地测试 token、固定测试 key 与 localhost 服务上执行该工作流，并保留算法、key 来源和验证器日志。
description.en: Run this workflow only with local test tokens, fixed test keys, and localhost services while preserving algorithm, key-source, and verifier logs.
